overall.description: First-person walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, elevated transit structures, and dense urban architecture. The footage showcases the vibrant Night City environment from Cyberpunk 2077 with heavy artificial lighting and moderate vehicle traffic.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered pedestrian walkway lined with glowing pink barriers on the right and a large planter on the left. The path leads toward an intersection under a massive elevated transit structure, with neon signs illuminating the night.

finishing crossing the intersection and stepping onto the opposite sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Crossing the open intersection with yellow crosswalk markings, passing through moderate traffic including a futuristic sports car. The Machine building becomes visible on the left with its distinctive neon signage, while the elevated transit structure remains overhead.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk directly beside The Machine building under the overpass

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing walking along the building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along the narrow sidewalk under the elevated transit structure, passing close to The Machine building's neon-trimmed facade. The space is enclosed and artificially lit, with the massive steel beams of the overpass dominating overhead.

tall building covered in vertical neon lights and multiple advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: Turning onto a busy commercial street lined with palm trees and massive digital billboards, including a prominent Samurai advertisement. The elevated transit structure recedes into the background on the left while futuristic vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered pedestrian walkway into the expansive, neon-drenched commercial heart of a cyberpunk city. It begins along a covered path lined with glowing pink barriers and planters, moving steadily toward a wide intersection beneath a massive elevated transit structure. As the camera crosses the yellow-marked street amidst moderate traffic and futuristic sports cars, the view opens up to reveal the neon signage of The Machine building on the left. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed space, gliding along a narrow sidewalk where the heavy steel beams of the overpass dominate the overhead view and the building's facade looms close. Finally, the camera turns away from the transit structure and onto a bustling commercial thoroughfare, where the environment expands into a wide street lined with palm trees and towering digital billboards featuring Samurai advertisements.
